null_zero_policy: if both pass proportions are zero classify ARTEFACT_GEOMETRY_ONLY; if real is positive and null is zero NULL_RATIO is zero

exact_test.name: one_sided_exact_binomial
exact_test.alternative: real pass proportion greater than null

evidence_labels.INDETERMINE: zero real passes or denominator integrity failure

price_null_policy: exchange-event timestamps, trade counts, sizes and aggressor sides remain fixed; every price-dependent direction and progress predicate is recomputed from each null price world before signals and account episodes
primary_metric: account-level net expectancy after frozen costs
CONTRE: Preserving timestamps in price-null worlds is necessary for an arrival mechanism but may make the tripwire generous if time-of-day seasonality alone drives account geometry; raw counts, exact binomial evidence and candidate economics must therefore remain separate.
